%take_along_axis.219 (Arg_0.23: f32[32,1000], Arg_1.1: s32[32,1]) -> (f32[32,1], s32[32,1,1]) {
  %Arg_1.1 = s32[32,1]{1,0} parameter(1)
  %constant.187 = s32[] constant(0)
  %lt.2 = s32[32,1]{1,0} broadcast(%constant.187), dimensions={}, metadata={op_name="lt"}
  %lt.3 = pred[32,1]{1,0} compare(%Arg_1.1, %lt.2), direction=LT, metadata={op_name="lt"}
  %constant.185 = s32[] constant(1000)
  %add.320 = s32[32,1]{1,0} broadcast(%constant.185), dimensions={}, metadata={op_name="add"}
  %add.321 = s32[32,1]{1,0} add(%Arg_1.1, %add.320), metadata={op_name="add"}
  %select_n.2 = s32[32,1]{1,0} select(%lt.3, %add.321, %Arg_1.1), metadata={op_name="select_n"}
  %reshape.100 = s32[32,1,1]{2,1,0} reshape(%select_n.2), metadata={op_name="reshape"}
  %constant.184 = s32[] constant(0)
  %ge.2 = s32[32,1,1]{2,1,0} broadcast(%constant.184), dimensions={}, metadata={op_name="ge"}
  %ge.3 = pred[32,1,1]{2,1,0} compare(%reshape.100, %ge.2), direction=GE, metadata={op_name="ge"}
  %constant.183 = s32[] constant(999)
  %le.2 = s32[32,1,1]{2,1,0} broadcast(%constant.183), dimensions={}, metadata={op_name="le"}
